privileged_info_summary: Task print_resolution@1 tests DPI metadata modification in GIMP. Verified facts: (1) Task downloads real Unsplash landscape image (1200×800px, JPEG) with default 72 DPI metadata. (2) Target is to set DPI to 300 with ±10 tolerance. (3) Pixel dimensions must remain exactly unchanged. (4) Uses PIL Image.info['dpi'] for extraction, which correctly reads (72,72) from test image. (5) Verifier allows ±5 mean pixel difference for JPEG compression. (6) Pass threshold is 75% (≥4 of 5 criteria). (7) All DPI standard values (72=screen, 300=print, 600=professional) are industry correct. (8) However, task.json lacks a 'metadata' field that audit instructions expected to find.
